Headline: #30 South Chicago Temporary Reroute at Avenue O/135th
ShortDescription: #30 South Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Avenue O/135th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#30 South Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Avenue O, 134th, Baltimore, Brainard, 134th, Avenue O and over normal route, due to street blockage near Avenue O/135th.

Allow extra travel time.
